Public link workflow

YouTube AI Video Detector

Paste a public YouTube URL or upload a clip you have the right to analyze. If the tool cannot fetch a public link, use an authorized upload instead.

Check a YouTube VideoUpload a Clip Instead
Free previewNo signup for basic checksEducational signal, not forensic proof.

Sample report only — this is demo content and not an analysis of your video.

Preview upload panel

Real media processing is not enabled yet. This launches a sample/manual checklist result only.

MP4, MOV, or WebM preview only

No file selected

Public-link checks depend on platform availability. We do not bypass login, paywall, DRM, private-account, or platform access restrictions. If a link cannot be processed, upload a file you have the right to analyze.

Current preview may show sample/manual checklist mode until automated detection is validated.

Evidence dashboard, not a verdict machine

This interface follows the data contract: sample/manual mode never presents a real user-specific verdict, confidence score, or evidence. Provider inference remains disabled until a real provider/model, retention policy, deletion flow, and compliance review are confirmed.

Public YouTube link caveats

Designed for cautious screening with clear labels, limitations, and no forensic or legal proof claims.

Upload fallback

Designed for cautious screening with clear labels, limitations, and no forensic or legal proof claims.

Platform access limitations

Designed for cautious screening with clear labels, limitations, and no forensic or legal proof claims.

Unaffiliated educational screening

Designed for cautious screening with clear labels, limitations, and no forensic or legal proof claims.

Sample report structure

This report is a preliminary AI/deepfake likelihood signal. It can be wrong, especially for compressed, edited, low-resolution, edited, or screen-recorded videos. Do not use it as the sole basis for legal, safety, employment, moderation, or other high-impact decisions.

Sample

Visual artifact review

Demo only: inconsistent edges, reflections, and compression artifacts would be summarized here.

Sample

Temporal consistency

Demo only: frame-to-frame motion or object continuity notes would appear here.

Not run

Face and lip-sync

Manual checklist: compare mouth movement, voice timing, and face geometry across cuts.

Limitation

Public-link limitation

Some public links cannot be fetched due to platform, region, login, DRM, or availability restrictions.

Request updates

Frequently asked questions

Can this check every YouTube link?

No. Public-link checks depend on availability, region, platform access, and technical limits. Private, login-only, DRM, paywalled, or unavailable videos are not processed.

Is this affiliated with YouTube?

No. This site is independently operated and is not affiliated with YouTube or Google.

Can this prove whether a video is AI-generated?

No. The current preview is an educational first-pass screening workflow. It shows sample/manual checklist mode unless a real detector provider is configured and compliance-reviewed.

Can I paste a YouTube or social video link?

You can paste a public link for the preview flow, but public-link processing depends on platform availability and access restrictions. We do not bypass logins, paywalls, DRM, or private accounts.

AI Video Detector

Results are preliminary educational signals, not forensic, legal, or moderation proof. This site is independently operated and is not affiliated with similarly named AI video detector sites or any video platform.

Preview/sample mode is active; automated detection remains disabled until provider validation and compliance review are complete.
